BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"1. I have failed more than I should have.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"0. I don't feel particularly guilty.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"0. I feel the same about myself as ever.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"1. I have thoughts of killing myself, but I would not carry them out.","Q9":"1. I cry more than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"0. I have not experienced any change in my sleeping pattern.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"2+. My appetite is much greater than usual.","Q19":"1. I can't concentrate as well as usual.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"2. I am much less interested in sex now."}
